历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the science group were approximately 42507 → 25217 → 22170 → 27275 → 25577, showing an overall trend of moving forward with fluctuations. The ranking was the lowest in 2021 (42507), and stabilized between 22000 and 27500 from 2022 to 2025, with a baseline of about 25577 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for the science group in Shaanxi Province: 60 in 2021, 63 in 2022, 72 in 2023, 75 in 2024, 78 in 2025; in 2026, the plan is 121, an increase of about 55.1% compared to 2025, a significant expansion that will notably lower the admission threshold.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Southwest University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 61st, with a continuous upward trend in recent years (68 → 69 → 72 → 69 → 66 → 61), indicating steadily improving comprehensive strength. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving campus food delivery management disputes, with no major negative impact. It ranks 38th in Douyin popularity (relatively hot), with medium to high short video exposure and moderate application attention. Psychology (A), Education (A), and Marxist Theory (A-) directly correspond to the university's applied psychology, education (Yan Yangchu Innovation Experimental Class) and other majors in science enrollment, providing positive attraction to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular science majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, highly consistent with the university's enrollment majors in computer science, electronic information, electrical engineering, etc. In 2026, the number of physics category examinees in Shaanxi Province is about 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% compared to 172,468 in 2025, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 25577 in 2025, a significant enrollment expansion of about 55.1% in 2026 causing a notable backward shift in ranking, an increase of about 19.7% in local physics category examinees intensifying competition, as well as factors like the university's rising ranking and high major popularity, the expansion effect far exceeds the increase in examinees. It is expected that the admission ranking will significantly move backward compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 33938, with a range of 33438 to 34438.

Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of 33438 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors like Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Artificial Intelligence. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit of 34438 can consider Tier 3 majors like Plant Production and Rongchang Campus majors as safety options. Rongchang Campus majors typically have lower admission rankings than the main campus, suitable for candidates with lower rankings.
